import re

# Read the full content
with open('_data/news/data_cache/36cc03efe14d8324.html.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Split by double newlines to get paragraphs
paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in content.split('\n\n') if p.strip()]

# Filter out navigation/UI elements
skip_patterns = [
    r'^\[\$\]$', r'^Tendințe$', r'^Categorii$', r'^Urmăriţi-ne$', r'^Recomandări$',
    r'^\[Ştiri de Cluj\]', r'^\[\]$', r'^[-•\[]', r'^Copyright', r'^Politica de',

    r'^Turism Cluj$', r'^VREMEA CLUJ$', r'^Divertisment$',

    r'^Turism Cluj$', r'^EDUCAȚIE$', r'^VREMEA CLUJ$',
    r'^Oameni de lângă noi$', r'^LEGAL$', r'^Utile Cluj$', r'^Lifestyle$',
    r'^Mancare - Retete$', r'^Amintiri din Cluj$', r'^Stiri Transilvania$',
    r'^Untold Festival Cluj$', r'^Zilele Clujului$', r'^Divertisment$',
    r'^Cultură / Concerte la Cluj$', r'^Bancuri și Farse$', r'^Sanatate$',
    r'^Stiri de Cluj LIVE$', r'^Politic/Administrativ$',
    r'^\[\d+_trafic-ro-logo\.png\]$',
]

def should_skip(p):
    for pattern in skip_patterns:
        if re.match(pattern, p):
            return True
    return False

# Filter paragraphs
filtered = [p for p in paragraphs if not should_skip(p)]

# Now extract articles - they appear as title + content pairs

articles = []
i = 0

            # Check if next is a category label

                continue
            # Check if next looks like a title
            if re.match(r'^(VIDEO\.|FOTO\.|AUDIO\.|EXCLUSIV\.|VIDEO:|FOTO:|AUDIO:|EXCLUSIV:)', next_p):
                break
            if len(next_p) > 30 and next_p[0].isupper() and not re.match(r'^\d{1,2} (Ianuarie|Februarie|Martie|Aprilie|Mai|Iunie|Iulie|August|Septembrie|Octombrie|Noiembrie|Decembrie)', next_p):
                # Could be next title
                # But check if it's content - content usually continues the story
                if content == "" or len(next_p) < 100:
                    break
            content += " " + next_p
            i += 1
        articles.append({'title': title.strip(), 'content': content.strip()})
    else:
        i += 1

# Deduplicate by title (first 80 chars)
seen = set()
unique = []
for a in articles:
    key = a['title'][:80]
    if key not in seen:
        seen.add(key)
        unique.append(a)

# Print for review
for i, a in enumerate(unique):
    print(f"=== Article {i+1} ===")
    print(f"Title: {a['title'][:120]}")
    print(f"Content: {a['content'][:200]}...")
    print()

print(f"Total: {len(unique)}")

# Save for next step
with open('/tmp/articles_raw.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(unique, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    """Add sarcastic VIDEO/FOTO/AUDIO mentions in content"""
    # Check title for prefixes
    title = text['title']
    content = text['content']
    
    has_video = bool(re.search(r'\b(VIDEO\.|VIDEO:)\b', title, re.IGNORECASE))
    has_foto = bool(re.search(r'\b(FOTO\.|FOTO:)\b', title, re.IGNORECASE))
    has_audio = bool(re.search(r'\b(AUDIO\.|AUDIO:)\b', title, re.IGNORECASE))
    has_exclusiv = bool(re.search(r'\b(EXCLUSIV\.|EXCLUSIV:)\b', title, re.IGNORECASE))
    
    # Clean title of prefixes for processing
    clean_title = re.sub(r'^(VIDEO\.|FOTO\.|AUDIO\.|EXCLUSIV\.|VIDEO:|FOTO:|AUDIO:|EXCLUSIV:)\s*', '', title)
    
    # Add sarcastic mentions in content
    sarcasm = []
    if has_video:

    if has_foto:

    if has_audio:

    if has_exclusiv:
        sarcasm.append("EXCLUSIV, ca la televizor, doar că e pe internet și nici nu e exclusiv")
    
    if sarcasm and content:
        content = content + " " + " ".join(sarcasm) + "."
